assert((t as int) * (a as int) + (t as int) * (b as int) == (y as int) - (x as int)) by(nonlinear_arith) requires (t as int) * ((a as int) + (b as int)) == (y as int) - (x as int), ;

placeholders.original_text: assert forall|t_prime: int| t_prime >= 1 implies !MeetAt(x as int, y as int, a as int, b as int, t_prime) by { if MeetAt(x as int, y as int, a as int, b as int, t_prime) { assert(x as int + t_prime * (a as int) == y as int - t_prime * (b as int)); // t_prime * a + t_prime * b == y - x == z assert(t_prime * (a as int) + t_prime * (b as int) == (y - x) as int); assert(t_prime * ((a as int) + (b as int)) == (z as int)) by(nonlinear_arith) requires t_prime * (a as int) + t_prime * (b as int) == (z as int), ; assert(t_prime * (c as int) == (z as int)); nla_step(t_prime, c as int, z as int, q, r); } }
assert((t as int) * (a as int) + (t as int) * (b as int) == (y as int) - (x as int)) by(nonlinear_arith) requires (t as int) * ((a as int) + (b as int)) == (y as int) - (x as int), ;
assert((t as int) >= 1) by(nonlinear_arith) requires (t as int) * (c as int) == (z as int), (z as int) > 0, (c as int) > 0, ;
